sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, input_string String, hashed_value FixedString(16));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, input_string, hashed_value) VALUES (1, 'sample input', MD4('sample input'));
SELECT id, input_string, hashed_value FROM test_table WHERE hashed_value = MD4('sample input');
UPDATE test_table SET hashed_value = MD4('updated input') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, input_string, hashed_value FROM test_table WHERE input_string LIKE 'sample%';
